title: Codex 回合 Lifecycle — 狀態 Evolution
note: IEC 60848 Grafcet modelling the observable state transitions in a single Codex API turn, from request building through compaction.

steps.name: Idle
steps.description: Session awaiting 使用者 輸入. WS may 是 connected (warm) 或 disconnected.

steps.name: Auth Resolved
steps.description: OAuth token valid, originator set, installationid available.

steps.name: Request Built
steps.description: responsesapi請求 body assembled: instructions, 輸入, tools, reasoning, 文字, clientmetadata, 上下文management.

steps.name: Delta Computed
steps.description: Incremental 輸入 delta calculated against previous 請求. If WS Session invalid 或 請求 shape changed, falls 回到 到 full 輸入.

steps.name: Transport Selected
steps.description: Transport chosen: WS (primary), HTTP SSE (fallback), 或 WebRTC (realtime). Headers attached including x-codex-window-id.

steps.name: Request Dispatched
steps.description: 請求 sent 在 selected transport. Awaiting first 回應 frame.

steps.name: Streaming
steps.description: 回應 事件 streaming: 文字 deltas, 工具 calls, reasoning items. Token usage accumulating.

steps.name: Turn Complete
steps.description: 回應 串流 ended. Final token usage known. 回應id captured 供 延續.

steps.name: Compaction Triggered
steps.description: Token usage exceeds compactthreshold. 壓縮 initiated (remote 或 inline).

steps.name: Compaction Complete
steps.description: History replaced 使用 compacted summary. WS Session reset. Window generation advanced.

steps.name: Error / Fallback
steps.description: Transport 錯誤, 驗證 failure, 或 速率限制. May trigger WS→HTTP fallback 或 重試.

transitions.condition: User input received ∧ auth token valid

actions: Compute input delta if WS session valid
Initiate compaction (remote if OpenAI, inline otherwise)

transitions.condition: Mid-stream stall timeout ∨ WS close ∨ rate_limit_exceeded

actions: WS→HTTP fallback if WS error (sticky per session)

parallel_branches.name: Subagent Fork
parallel_branches.description: During S6, 工具 calls may 啟動 子代理 turns. Each 子代理 follows its own S0→S7 lifecycle 使用 inherited 驗證 but separate threadid.
parallel_branches.notes: Subagent gets x-codex-parent-thread-id = parent conversation_id, x-openai-subagent header, separate window_generation

parallel_branches.name: Inter-Agent Mailbox
parallel_branches.description: NEW: Agents can send InterAgentCommunication 透過 Mailbox. Receiver checks 待處理 mails before/during 回合. Preemption possible after reasoning/commentary items.
